problems_encountered.description: HTTP 500 Internal Server Error when attempting to create MySQL database. API endpoint /v2/projects/{projectId}/mysql-databases returned 500.

tool_response_summary: Failed with 500 Internal Server Error. Server-side issue prevented database creation.
execution_notes: Tool call properly formatted with required parameters (projectId, description, version=mysql84). API returned 500 error, indicating server-side issue or possibly quota/resource limits reached. Tool itself working correctly.
